Wrong tool selection contrary to workflow (e.g., using calculator for unit conversions or knowledge_lookup for conversions)
Invalid or unsupported tool parameters (unsupported unit pairs, topic mismatches, JSON string instead of object)
Missing required planning step before execution
Failure to chain tool outputs; hard-coding or reusing provided values instead of previous results
Incomplete computations (missing final ratios/percentages/conversions or final answers)
Omitting required intermediate steps/results and explicit tool-based conversions
Redundant or unnecessary tool calls for already provided facts, adding no progress and risking inconsistencies
Incorrect or inconsistent unit handling (mixing units, failing to convert to required units)
Not adapting to tool limitations (failing to acknowledge unsupported conversions and choose a workaround)
Mis-invoked tools or non-executed textual calls (parameters present but call not actually run)
Failing to cover all requested sub-tasks or outputs (e.g., partial rankings, missing entity names)
Mislabeling precision or neglecting to note rounding
